parsec_vehcore.title: ^1[MAJOR UPDATE]^0
changelog: [MAJOR] Reworked the configuration system. Replaced XML configs with FiveM.cfg files. Now deployed alongside server.cfg
[MAJOR] Added a new dependency: parsec_lib. Deployed alongside the resource
Reworked the labeling system to export accurate information
parsec_vehcore.note: ^5Download the latest build from Cfx.re Portal: https://portal.cfx.re^0

parsec_vehspawner.title: ^3[UPDATE]^0
changelog: Improved readability and accessibility by adding folder and vehicle spawn names
Changed scrollbar behavior to reset when changing pages
Removed ox_lib dependency. The resource now performs a runtime check
